response.overview: Chelsea and her boyfriend, Jake, are the stars of a hit reality television show called Renovation Romance, which focuses on fixing up homes and relationships. When the network tasks them with a live Christmas special to remodel a cozy cabin in New Hampshire, Chelsea expects a romantic getaway. Instead, Jake becomes obsessed with his career and leaves for meetings in New York, leaving Chelsea behind to complete the rustic cabin remodel alongside the owner, Cooper. As Chelsea and Cooper work closely together, they discover shared values, unexpected chemistry, and realize that being with the most "familiar" person doesn't necessarily mean they are compatible.
response.title: Christmas Under Construction
